title: EQ - Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time
scenario: EQ setting changes (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ sliders) are heard in real time while music is playing, with Custom EQ taking effect upon slider release
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Tap on Audio Settings, then select Equalizer.
4. Play music on the connected Android device.
5. Tap on the Bass preset in the Equalizer screen and listen to the audio output.
6. Tap on the Flat preset and listen to the audio output.
7. Tap on the Bright preset and listen to the audio output.
8. Tap on Custom EQ to enable the custom equalizer sliders.
9. Drag one of the Custom EQ sliders to a new position, then release the slider.
10. Listen to the audio output after releasing the slider.
expected: For Bass, Flat, and Bright presets, the audio output changes in real time immediately upon selecting the preset. For Custom EQ, the audio output changes only after the user releases the slider.
